why_needed: The raw reaction demands more pattern recognition before official excerpting begins.
how_it_relates_to_this_case: This case contains multiple roles disguised by source order.

trigger: source provides commas, sequencing, or other structural cues
why_needed: Useful hints should support confidence without taking over the decision.
how_it_relates_to_this_case: The owner explicitly demotes such source cues to hint-level only.

trigger: splitting or relocating text risks dropping original wording
why_needed: The owner restates the base rule that the author’s text should not be lost.
how_it_relates_to_this_case: Any packaging exception must still preserve the original text somewhere reliable.

trigger: system is tempted to promote a short mention into its own leaf or suppress it as insignificant
why_needed: Leaf pollution and significance thresholds are not trivial.
how_it_relates_to_this_case: A quick proof mention may or may not deserve its own leaf depending on fuller later treatment.
